projects.caption: Smart Campus Navigation with Queue and Appointment Integration
dialog: This project is our capstone project way back in college
I learned so much building this
It's a group project and I have my groupmates to thank for that
Without them this project wouldn't be possible
We used Laravel with Volt and Livewire for the frontend and backend
and MySQL for the database
You can view the project and it's documentation if you want.

projects.caption: Access Control Log System
dialog: This one is our project for our System Analysis and Design subject
This project is one of the most challenging projects we've done
Because it's our first time to do a documented research and development project
But despite that.....the project turned out to be a success
and I thank my groupmates for that
btw we used Laravel for backend and Angular for the frontend and MySQL for the database
Unfortunately we don't have a live version of the project but you can view the documentation if you want.

projects.caption: Northern Luzon Adventist Hospital's Management Information System
dialog: Uhh....about this project.....
I don't even know where to start with this one
This project is a real life project that I did for my internship in Northern Luzon Adventist Hospital
This system is like All in One type shi
Because anything you can think of that a hospital needs, this system has it
maybe??? Idk
Because it's a system with a lot of modules like Employee's Portal, HRIS, Maintenance, Inventory, Payroll, Leave Management, etc., atbp, and many more
And we only use laravel for this project
Unfortunately you can't access the Employee's Portal but you can view the front of the website if you want.

projects.caption: Mobile Point of Sales System(Android)
dialog: About this one....
I just did this out of boredom hehe
I just taken the idea of a point of sales system from my intern project and just made it mobile
But it lowkeys works tho, and it works offline too
I use Kotlin for the frontend and Java for the backend and SQLite for the database
You can get the copy of the sample of the app without any database if you want.

projects.caption: Chrono Paradox
dialog: This is our game development project for our Software Engineering subject
I really did enjoy this project because I really like game development
I even have some sleepless nights just to code and draw the assets for this game
Yup, I drew all the assets for this project.
The game is about a boy who found a time watch and he can use it to travel in time blah blah blah
We use Phaser as a game engine and we use Angular for front end
I can't show you the live version of the game but you can view the screenshots if you want.

projects.caption: Omori Inspired Portfolio Website
dialog: Yes this is the one you're currently viewing
I made this portfolio because I think there's no one did their portfolio based on their favorite game
maybe??? Idk
I used Next.js for this and Vercel for hosting
